historiographic_note: The year -2433 is not documented in any known historical source. The historical record for the mid-3rd millennium BCE is organized by reigns, dynasties, and archaeological phases, not by individual years. Year-by-year documentation does not exist for this period in any civilization. This year is included for chronological completeness but represents a gap in historical documentation.
